answers.contents: bbc首页头条跟踪了最新的进展，不过内容是英文的

https://www.bbc.com/news/live/world-asia-63776816
bbc整理的时间线，但是有一些滞后：

Summary
    Protests against strict Covid measures in China spilled into a second night and spread to the biggest cities
    Demonstrators gather in the capital Beijing and the financial hub Shanghai, where some called for President Xi Jinping to resign
    Protesters are angry at Xi's zero-Covid approach, which involves mass testing, quarantines and snap lockdowns
    The latest unrest follows a protest in the north-western city of Urumqi, where 10 people died in a tower block fire
    Protesters blamed lockdown rules for hampering rescue efforts, but authorities deny this
    Protests have also taken place in the south-western city of Chengdu and central cities of Xi'an and also Wuhan
    Wuhan is where the Covid outbreak originated nearly three years ago
早就说了，品葱置顶的东西要加红加粗，不然根本没人看
